get.description: Returns a list of team members for autocomplete search dropdowns (Task 3.4)

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's name and/or email.

post.description:
Allows an authenticated, onboarded user to change their password voluntarily.
(First-login forced reset uses POST /auth/reset-password instead.)

get.description: Returns a list of projects the authenticated user belongs to.
View all users with pagination and search (Admin Only)

post.description: Create a new user with generated temporary password (Admin Only)

put.description: Update user details like email, name, and role (Admin Only)

get.description: View user action audit logs (Admin Only)

post.description: Assigns a user to a task.

put.description: Bulk assigns users to a task, overwriting existing assignments.

get.description: Retrieves all assignees for a given task.

delete.description: Unassigns a user from a task.

get.description: Retrieves the VAPID Public Key needed to subscribe to push notifications.

post.description: Subscribes the current user's device/browser to push notifications.
Unsubscribes the current user's device/browser from push notifications.
Adds a new member to the project.

get.description: Retrieves all members of the project.
Retrieves details of a specific project member.

patch.description: Updates the role of a project member.

delete.description: Removes a member from the project.

patch.description: Assigns the Project Manager role to a project member (Admin only).
Assigns the Collaborator role to a project member.

get.description: Retrieves all comments for a specific task.

post.description: Posts a new comment to a specific task.

First-login password reset (and any subsequent voluntary reset).
Requires a valid JWT — users with mustResetPassword=true are ONLY
allowed to call this endpoint until they complete the reset.
Refreshes the session of an already-logged-in user, extending their token expiration.

get.description: Retrieves all attachments for a specific task.

post.description: Uploads file metadata directly to a task.

delete.description: Deletes an attachment metadata record by ID.

post.description:
Generates a cryptographically signed S3 PUT URL.
Requires project membership validation and enforces a 25MB file size boundary.
